source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division — Postcards Collection
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: Waterfront, Ketchikan, Alaska
description: Historic gelatin silver postcard showing the Ketchikan waterfront along Tongass Narrows with canneries, wharves, and snow-capped Deer Mountain rising behind the town. Card produced by Fisher Studio between 1900 and 1940.
alt: Historic black-and-white postcard of the Ketchikan waterfront with snow-capped Deer Mountain behind the town
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-12 — downloaded from loc.gov and visually confirmed
